mapper.sql: laboratory_id, laboratory_name, image_url, location, status, manager_id, created_at
mapper.insert: insert into laboratory (laboratory_id, laboratory_name, image_url, location, status, manager_id, created_at, description) values (#{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{laboratory_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into laboratory
laboratory_id, laboratory_name, image_url, location, status, manager_id, created_at, description,
#{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{laboratory_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update: update laboratory set laboratory_name = #{laboratory_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update laboratory set laboratory_name = #{laboratory_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_url = #{image_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where laboratory_id = #{laboratory_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
,
from laboratory where status = '空闲'

select
,
from laboratory where manager_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '可能发生故障'
